mapper.select: SELECT s.reqno, s.last_judge_time, s.primary_site, s.nosocomial_likelihood, r.result_json FROM infection_case_snapshot s OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 * FROM infection_alert_result r WHERE r.reqno = s.reqno ORDER BY r.create_time DESC, r.result_version DESC, r.id DESC ) r WHERE s.reqno = #{reqno}
mapper.update: MERGE infection_pre_review_demo WITH (HOLDLOCK) AS target USING (SELECT #{reqno} AS reqno) AS source ON target.reqno = source.reqno WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET timeline_html = #{timelineHtml}, ai_pre_review_json = #{aiPreReviewJson} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (reqno, timeline_html, ai_pre_review_json) VALUES (#{reqno}, #{timelineHtml}, #{aiPreReviewJson});
